22:33 â December 29, 2022
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, as announced in the
2023 New Prices for Digital and Payment Solutions
notice published September 27, 2022. Additional changes are described
here
.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only. The fee changes come into effect January 1, 2023.
